case_title: LUZ L CARRILLO VS. PAULOS AYELE ADHINOM et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT ADHINOM, PAULOS AYELE
JUDGMENT CREDITORS REQUEST FOR FUNDS FOWARED TO ACCOUNTING
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARRILLO, LUZ L AS TO DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB COMPANY INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARRILLO, LUZ L RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADHINOM, PAULOS AYELE $508.08 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $603.08, TOTAL DAMAGES SUFFERED BY PLAINTIFF IS $1016.15. THE LIABILITY FOR THE DAMAGES IS 50% PLAINTIFF AND 50% DEFENDANT. THEREFORE, PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGE IS $508.08. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
